products.name: Pay Per Send
features: Basic delivery scheduling (up to 7 days out)

features: Send history (recover drafts up to 30 days old)

features: Best value — pays for itself around the 35th card

subscription_policy.auto_renew: Subscriptions auto-renew at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled
subscription_policy.cancel_anytime: Subscribers can cancel auto-renewal at any time
subscription_policy.cancel_immediate: Immediate cancellation is available; no partial-period refund is issued for the current cycle
subscription_policy.cancel_at_period_end: Recommended — cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period
